name: Apple Cake Deluxe
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Nuts; chopped, or more, if desired
1 tsp Cinnamon; or more, if desired
1 tsp Vanilla; or more, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream oil and sugar in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add eggs and beat well.
3. Mix all dry ingredients and sift into the mixture, stirring until combined.
4. Add apples and vanilla, stirring to combine thoroughly.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured angel food or Bundt pan, or 4 small nut loaf pans.
6. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C).
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Note: Small nut loaf pans should cook for about 35-45 minutes; check using the baking done test.
May be eaten plain or frosted with a very simple icing made with powdered sugar, melted butter, vanilla, milk, lemon, and/or cinnamon extract.
